modmenu.descriptionTranslation.aetherkla: The world has a voice. You are learning to play it.
advancements.aetherklang.on_beat_hit.des: Land your first strike in time with the rhythm
advancements.aetherklang.defeat_choral.d: Defeat Choral and end the dissonance
Link with another Resonant for the first time
advancements.aetherklang.reach_adept.des: Reach Adept grade with 150 lifetime RP
advancements.aetherklang.tame_taktling.d: Earn a Beatling's trust with a Gold Resonance Crystal
Unseal your first folio from a Resonance Archive
kodex.aetherklang.title: CODEX OF RESONANCE
kodex.aetherklang.subtitle: TONARIUM · ARCHIVE OF THE WORLD-VOICE
kodex.aetherklang.locked.hint: This page does not answer your voice yet. Discover its resonance in the world.
kodex.aetherklang.page.welcome.title: The First Note
kodex.aetherklang.page.welcome.subtitle: A world that listens
kodex.aetherklang.page.welcome.body.1: The world has a voice. Stone hums, crystal answers, and every step marks a beat. You are a Resonant: one who can hear and shape that hidden song.
kodex.aetherklang.page.welcome.body.2: This Codex is your Tonarium. Its pages awaken as you meet beings, hear places, and act at the right moment.
kodex.aetherklang.page.world_song.title: The Song of the World
kodex.aetherklang.page.world_song.body.1: Before the first structures, Aetherklang ran through all things. Its five moods kept growth, motion, and rest in balance.
kodex.aetherklang.page.world_song.body.2: Every action echoes. Clean timing strengthens the world; hurried strikes leave dissonance behind.
kodex.aetherklang.page.dissonance.title: The Broken Voice
kodex.aetherklang.page.dissonance.body.1: Dissonance is not silence. It is sound without accord: torn apart, repeated, and forged into a weapon by Choral.
kodex.aetherklang.page.dissonance.body.2: Close rifts, play precisely, and retune at an altar. Violence without listening only strengthens its refrain.
kodex.aetherklang.page.mood_compass.body: Moods are resonance stances, not classes. Cycle them with M to adapt range, tempo, and risk.
A Mood Altar stabilizes your choice. Read its color, particles, and HUD before beginning a combo.
kodex.aetherklang.page.five_moods.title: The Five Moods
kodex.aetherklang.page.five_moods.body.1: SILENCE lowers creature awareness. JOY heals you and nearby allies in gentle pulses. WRATH empowers offensive resonance.
kodex.aetherklang.page.five_moods.body.2: SORROW carries you through slowing and control. WONDER grants luck, note sparks, and unexpected opportunity.
kodex.aetherklang.page.five_moods.body.3: No mood wins alone. A Resonant listens first, then changes.
kodex.aetherklang.page.beat_windows.body: PERFECT: at 120 BPM, within ±40 ms. Gold feedback marks maximum RP and effect.
GOOD: within ±100 ms. Cyan feedback confirms stable timing and normal resonance.
MISS: outside ±100 ms. The action may work, but builds no perfect chain.
On-beat actions, discovery, and harmonic support generate RP. Perfect chains improve the return.
Instrument abilities consume RP. Keep a reserve for movement or defense instead of spending every note.
Missed beats, rifts, and risky powers raise dissonance. High values distort encounters and empower Choral.
Clean cadences, Silence, and closed rifts calm it. Break a combo rather than forcing a bad beat.
kodex.aetherklang.page.tuning_fork.title: The Tuning Fork
The Tuning Fork finds hidden resonance, tests crystals, and reveals the base pulse of a place.
Carry it while exploring. Its answer is quieter than a quest marker, but more precise than a guess.
kodex.aetherklang.page.arsenal.title: Blade, Harp, Hammer
kodex.aetherklang.page.arsenal.subtitle: Three voices at three ranges
kodex.aetherklang.page.arsenal.body.1: The RESONANCE BLADE performs quick melee cadences and rewards rhythm changes.
kodex.aetherklang.page.arsenal.body.2: The ECHO HARP shapes ranged sound and controls space. The BASS HAMMER breaks posture with heavy accents.
kodex.aetherklang.page.arsenal.body.3: Every instrument needs good timing, the right mood, and enough RP.
kodex.aetherklang.page.echo_boots.title: Echo Boots
kodex.aetherklang.page.echo_boots.subtit: The space between is also a beat
kodex.aetherklang.page.echo_boots.body.1: Echo Boots store the aftersound of your steps. Press R to trigger a Resonance Dash when available.
kodex.aetherklang.page.echo_boots.body.2: Dash through shockwaves, toward a new beat, or out of Choral's cadence—not merely forward.
kodex.aetherklang.page.crystals.title: Four Resonance Crystals
kodex.aetherklang.page.crystals.subtitle: Indigo · Cyan · Gold · Magenta
kodex.aetherklang.page.crystals.body.1: Indigo stores base tone, Cyan conducts resonance, Gold holds precise timing, and Magenta binds dangerous dissonance.
kodex.aetherklang.page.crystals.body.2: Crystals are both guides and materials for instruments, altars, and portals.
kodex.aetherklang.page.mood_altar.title: The Mood Altar
kodex.aetherklang.page.mood_altar.body.1: A Mood Altar aligns resonance, stabilizes moods, and prepares demanding cadences.
kodex.aetherklang.page.mood_altar.body.2: Build it somewhere calm and protected. Nearby dissonance can distort the ritual.
kodex.aetherklang.page.rift_portal.title: Rift & Glockenspiel
A Dissonance Rift spills broken sound and creatures. Close it with tuned actions, not blind damage.
The Glockenspiel Portal is its controlled opposite: a stable sequence opening the Tonarium.
kodex.aetherklang.page.dissonance_spirit: A mistake that learned to walk
Dissonance Spirits gather near rifts. Their irregular attacks tempt early strikes and punish panic.
Keep distance, find the recurring offbeat, and answer with one clean accent.
kodex.aetherklang.page.echo_denizens.sub: Not every strange sound is an enemy
kodex.aetherklang.page.echo_denizens.bod: The Echo Guardian tests posture and endurance. Its heavy patterns leave a clear counter-window.
Echo Notes are small floating memories. Follow them toward resonance, secrets, or a safe beat.
kodex.aetherklang.page.tonarium.title: The Tonarium
kodex.aetherklang.page.tonarium.subtitle: Archive beyond the echo
kodex.aetherklang.page.tonarium.body.1: In the Tonarium, sound becomes landscape: string bridges, echo chambers, and crystal archives react to mood and beat.
kodex.aetherklang.page.tonarium.body.2: Bring spare instruments and RP. Distances deceive, and some paths exist only during a cadence.
kodex.aetherklang.page.portal_rite.title: Portal Rite
A Glockenspiel Portal requires resonance crystals and a stable tone sequence. Mistakes raise local dissonance.
Secure the site, tune at an altar, and begin only when you can hear the base pulse.
kodex.aetherklang.page.choral.title: Choral
kodex.aetherklang.page.choral.subtitle: Conductor of broken voices
kodex.aetherklang.page.choral.body.1: Choral is a conductor, not a silent monster. It gathers dissonance, layers attacks into phrases, and changes the arena's beat.
kodex.aetherklang.page.choral.body.2: Watch the baton, not only the body. Every phrase announces its finale and safest response window.
kodex.aetherklang.page.final_cadence.bod: Destroy dissonant anchors first, reserve RP for movement and defense, and answer at the end of a phrase.
In the final phase, safe zones alternate with the beat. One calm perfect action beats three panicked hits.
kodex.aetherklang.page.progression.title: Path of the Resonant
kodex.aetherklang.page.progression.subti: From first crystal to final cadence
1. Find crystals and craft a Tuning Fork. 2. Learn the pulse on safe targets. 3. Build a Mood Altar.
4. Craft an instrument and close rifts. 5. Gather all four crystal colors. 6. Open a Glockenspiel Portal.
7. Explore the Tonarium, read Choral's phrases, and end the broken cadence.
kodex.aetherklang.page.controls.title: Controls
kodex.aetherklang.page.controls.subtitle: Hands on the beat
kodex.aetherklang.page.controls.body.1: K opens the Codex, M cycles moods, and R triggers Resonance Dash. Using the Codex item also opens it.
kodex.aetherklang.page.controls.body.2: Rebind K, M, and R under Options → Controls → Aetherklang; the N music toggle is under Miscellaneous. Escape closes the Tonarium.
kodex.aetherklang.page.commands.title: Commands
kodex.aetherklang.page.commands.subtitle: Tools for testing & staging
kodex.aetherklang.page.commands.body.1: /aetherklang checks the mod. Subcommands rp, mood, beat, and codex report their systems' status.
kodex.aetherklang.page.commands.body.2: These are diagnostics in the current release. Normal progression comes from play, not the console.
kodex.aetherklang.page.ensemble_listenin: PLAYABLE · Proximity becomes a shared pulse
When at least two players act on the same beat within twelve blocks, they form a ten-second ensemble. Each later on-beat action grants +1 RP once per beat.
The Chord HUD shows ensemble size. Beat Bridges also remain solid between beat windows while two players are nearby.
kodex.aetherklang.page.chord_cadences.bo: Three on-beat actions write their moods into the Chord HUD. Silence–Joy–Wonder heals the group; Wrath–Wrath–Sorrow damages and slows enemies.
Sorrow–Silence–Joy heals, clears Slowness, and regenerates. Wonder–Wrath–Wonder launches glowing enemies. Every chord reaches eight blocks.
kodex.aetherklang.page.beat_bridges.subt: PLAYABLE · A path at the right moment
kodex.aetherklang.page.beat_bridges.body: Beat Bridges become solid during the GOOD window and lose collision between beats. Read the 120 BPM pulse before stepping on.
With at least two players inside twelve blocks, the bridge stays stable. This is the first playable ensemble advantage.
kodex.aetherklang.page.resonance_archive: PLAYABLE · Memories in three crystal halls
Three archives lie beyond the Resonance Gardens. Use each location to unseal one fixed Codex folio; knowledge already opened remains open.
Sound Lanterns pulse at 120 BPM. Touched Soundflowers answer with a note and sparks, at most once every 1.5 seconds per creature.
Your grade follows RP actually credited over your lifetime: Novice at 0, Adept at 150, Virtuoso at 400, and Maestro at 900 total RP.
Spending never lowers total RP. RP that cannot be credited because your active pool is full does not count as a gain.
kodex.aetherklang.page.rank_sigil.title: The Rank Sigil
kodex.aetherklang.page.rank_sigil.subtit: PLAYABLE · A sign above the Resonance HUD
kodex.aetherklang.page.rank_sigil.body.1: The sigil shows grade and total RP above the resonance panel. Extra strokes and gold corners distinguish high grades without relying on color.
kodex.aetherklang.page.rank_sigil.body.2: The server stores the lifetime value and synchronizes it through rang_sync. Death and RP spending never revoke an earned grade.
kodex.aetherklang.page.organ_horn.title: Organ Horn
kodex.aetherklang.page.organ_horn.subtit: PLAYABLE · Pressure wave across twelve blocks
kodex.aetherklang.page.organ_horn.body.1: Hold use for at least half a second and release in the GOOD window. For 10 RP, the horn emits a cone dealing 7 damage, knockback, and Darkness.
kodex.aetherklang.page.organ_horn.body.2: PERFECT strengthens knockback and can award the usual perfect-timing RP. A MISS spends nothing and produces no wave.
kodex.aetherklang.page.fermata_bell.subt: PLAYABLE · Eight seconds of suspended space
kodex.aetherklang.page.fermata_bell.body: The Fermata Bell requires Adept grade. Throw it for 16 RP; on impact it unfolds an eight-second dome with a six-block radius.
The dome heavily slows living beings and almost stops projectiles; the thrower remains free. It then enters a twenty-second cooldown.
kodex.aetherklang.page.klangweaver_armor: PLAYABLE · Four pieces, four resonance benefits
The helmet marks up to sixteen resonance sources in a 12×6×12 search. The chestplate raises the RP cap to 120; leggings widen GOOD by 0.03 phase.
The boots enable Resonance Dash for 6 instead of 8 RP. Every piece draws an aura; the full set adds Afterecho.
kodex.aetherklang.page.afterecho.title: Afterecho
kodex.aetherklang.page.afterecho.body.1: The full Klangweaver set repeats the reward from a perfect action ten ticks later at half strength and for at least +1 RP.
kodex.aetherklang.page.afterecho.body.2: Blade and Bass Hammer also replay their resonance effect on the target. A beat ring, sparks, and a high tone mark the answer.
kodex.aetherklang.page.siren.title: Siren
kodex.aetherklang.page.siren.subtitle: PLAYABLE · A song that demands proximity
kodex.aetherklang.page.siren.body.1: The flying Siren sings every six seconds and pulls creatures during its phrase from up to sixteen blocks away.
kodex.aetherklang.page.siren.body.2: On-beat hits deal 1.75 times damage. Use single clean accents instead of fighting the pull with a frantic series.
kodex.aetherklang.page.beatling.title: Beatling
kodex.aetherklang.page.beatling.subtitle: PLAYABLE · A small companion in the base pulse
kodex.aetherklang.page.beatling.body.1: Beatlings hop in the ten-tick pulse and follow a tamer. One Gold Resonance Crystal earns their trust.
kodex.aetherklang.page.beatling.body.2: Tamed Beatlings can sit or accompany you. Outside commands and spawn eggs, their natural home is the Kammerton.
message.aetherklang.fermatenglocke.rang_: The Fermata Bell requires Adept grade.
message.aetherklang.stimmgabel.empty: The Tuning Fork hears no resonance source nearby.
message.aetherklang.altar.no_crystals: No resonance crystals answer within six blocks.
message.aetherklang.rift.seal_failed: The rift resists. Sealing it requires %s RP.
message.aetherklang.portal.denied: The portal demands the Codex or %s RP.
message.aetherklang.portal.unavailable: The Kammerton cadence cannot be reached.
message.aetherklang.portal.arrival: Kammerton · Follow the golden cadence to Choral's arena.
message.aetherklang.portal.return: The Glockenspiel returns you to the Overworld.
message.aetherklang.choral.awakens: Choral awakens · Answer the broken cadence!
message.aetherklang.boss_tremolo.awakens: Tremolo awakens in the Great Drum!
message.aetherklang.boss_glissanda.awake: Glissanda glides across the String Bridges!
message.aetherklang.boss_kakophon.awaken: Kakophon rises from the Swarm Throne!
message.aetherklang.boss_generalpause.aw: General Pause takes the Empty Podium!
message.aetherklang.stimmpfeiler.not_att: Attune this pillar with a Tuning Fork first.
message.aetherklang.stimmpfeiler.no_dest: No other safe attuned pillar answers within 48 blocks.
message.aetherklang.kristallresonator.no: No resonance crystal answers within five blocks.
message.aetherklang.kaskade.started: A Dissonance Cascade tears open the world!
message.aetherklang.weltakkord.reduced: Small World Chord! Solo cadence resolved.
command.aetherklang.kaskade.unavailable: A Cascade cannot begin here or one is already active.
command.aetherklang.kaskade.status.activ: A Cascade is active in this world.
command.aetherklang.kaskade.status.quiet: No Cascade is active in this world.
tooltip.aetherklang.schmiede.bonus.relik: Bonus: Night Vision and clears Darkness
tooltip.aetherklang.instrument.pauke: 8 RP · shockwave damages and launches nearby enemies
tooltip.aetherklang.instrument.sopranflo: 5 RP · heals allies and clears Poison
tooltip.aetherklang.instrument.kontrabas: 7 RP · fortifies you and suppresses nearby enemies
tooltip.aetherklang.instrument.triangel: 4 RP · grants Speed and reveals nearby enemies
message.aetherklang.schmiede.help: Hold an instrument in your main hand. Keep materials in your inventory or a relic in your offhand.
message.aetherklang.schmiede.max_tier: This instrument is already virtuoso tier.
message.aetherklang.schmiede.no_recipe: The anvil knows no recipe for this sound tier.
partitur.aetherklang.title: SCORE OF THE DAY
partitur.aetherklang.empty: The Score Stand is waiting for the server score.
partitur.aetherklang.contract.motiv_refr: Defeat six motif creatures of any kind.
partitur.aetherklang.contract.resonanzga: Visit the garden ring deep in the Kammerton.
message.aetherklang.partitur.complete: Contract complete: %s · reward ready at the Score Stand
leitmotiv.aetherklang.title: LEITMOTIV
leitmotiv.aetherklang.subtitle: YOUR MELODY · YOUR PATH
leitmotiv.aetherklang.hint: Hover over a motif to read its effect. Unlocks cost Clefs.
message.aetherklang.leitmotiv.prerequisi: The previous motif in this voice is still missing.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.goldener_schl: Widens the PERFECT window by 0.01 beat phase.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.druckwelle.de: Resonance attacks deal another 5% more damage.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.jagdmotiv.des: Every positive RP gain grants 1 additional RP.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.fortissimo.de: Resonance attacks deal another 7.5% more damage.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.praezision.de: Widens the PERFECT window by another 0.01 beat phase.
Every positive RP gain grants another RP.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.finale.descri: Resonance attacks deal another 10% more damage.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.offenes_ohr.d: Widens the GOOD window by 0.015 beat phase.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.heilender_ref: Your resonance healing is another 15% stronger.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.gemeinsamer_t: Widens the GOOD window by another 0.015 beat phase.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.lebenslied.de: Your resonance healing is another 25% stronger.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.fundmelodie.d: Every positive RP gain grants 1 additional RP.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.weiter_horizo: Widens the GOOD window by 0.015 beat phase.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.echopfad.desc: Resonance Dashes cost another 1 less RP.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.klangspeicher: Raises your maximum RP by another 15.
leitmotiv.aetherklang.node.weltchor.desc: Every positive RP gain grants another RP.
Resonance Dashes cost another 2 less RP.
kodex.aetherklang.page.sinfonie_overture: PLAYABLE · The Klangmeer opens its score
SINFONIE expands the Kammerton with an outer Klangmeer of 48 islands, four great regions, four Bosswerk encounters, and data-driven Motif creatures.
Score, Leitmotiv, and Sound Forge connect exploration, contracts, boss loot, and instrument upgrades into a long-term progression arc.
Arrival is at 0 / 129 / 0, Choral's arena at 0 / 140 / 96, and the Resonance Garden ring around 0 / 129 / 272.
The center is your safe prelude. Tune equipment, gather RP, then follow the distant voices of the Klangmeer.
Eight Resonance Gardens surround the southern Tonarium. Archives stand near -68 / 137 / 342, 0 / 142 / 394, and 68 / 137 / 342.
Beat Bridges hold during the GOOD window or through ensemble stabilization. Archives unseal location-bound memories.
kodex.aetherklang.page.bassgewoelbe.body: Bass slate, deep pulses, and heavy island bodies shape the west. The region's Tone Pillar marks its principal voice.
Bring control and knockback resistance. Slow enemy phrases punish early attacks but open clear cadence windows.
kodex.aetherklang.page.arpeggienmeer.bod: East of the center, Resonance Wood islands rise like broken scales. A cyan-crowned Tone Pillar stands at the region's heart.
Movement is part of the melody here. Reserve RP for dashes and read glide paths before crossing a gap.
kodex.aetherklang.page.kakophonie_riff.b: Motif voices, magenta fragments, and abrupt accents overlap in the south. The third Tone Pillar carries a magenta crown.
Separate swarms instead of answering every voice at once. Area control and a clean retreat prevent a dissonance spiral.
kodex.aetherklang.page.klangmeer_navigat: The world seed composes 48 islands from recurring archetypes. Markers prevent duplicate generation; west, east, and south remain fixed integration anchors.
Travel in stages: center, gardens, outer ring, regional pillars. Mark return routes and reserve enough RP for movement and emergencies.
kodex.aetherklang.page.bosswerk.title: The Bosswerk
kodex.aetherklang.page.bosswerk.subtitle: PLAYABLE · Encounters loaded as scores
kodex.aetherklang.page.bosswerk.body.1: Every Sinfonie boss follows a validated three-phase score. Attacks begin on the ten-tick beat, telegraph, then execute one or two beats later.
kodex.aetherklang.page.bosswerk.body.2: Read operation, radius, and telegraph. Phase changes reset the phrase and recolor the boss bar for the new intensity.
kodex.aetherklang.page.boss_tremolo.body: Tremolo begins with note rings and shockwaves, accelerates through glide strikes, then summons Motif creatures into its broken figure.
Below one-third health, attacks arrive every two beats. Fermata and Cacophony demand open escape routes rather than long attack chains.
kodex.aetherklang.page.boss_glissanda.bo: Glissanda joins glide strikes to beam lines. Shockwaves and note rings enter during the middle phase.
Move across marked lines and save Resonance Dash for overlapping glide paths. Standing still turns space control into a hit.
kodex.aetherklang.page.boss_kakophon.bod: Kakophon opens with Cacophony and Motif summons. Later phases compress rings, shockwaves, and beams into short two-beat phrases.
Clear summoned Motifs before forcing damage. Every surviving side voice reduces the space available for the next boss phrase.
kodex.aetherklang.page.boss_generalpause: General Pause introduces Silence Zones and Fermatas, later adding beam lines and Motif creatures before closing with shockwaves.
Its long opening phase rewards patience. Keep RP outside the silent zone and attack only after the resolution.
kodex.aetherklang.page.boss_telegraphs.s: PLAYABLE · Warning is part of the music
kodex.aetherklang.page.boss_telegraphs.b: Shockwave, Note Ring, Beam Line, Silence Zone, Summon, Cacophony, Glide Strike, and Fermata each have distinct particle language.
One or two telegraph beats are reaction time. Finish the current action, move decisively, then answer after release.
kodex.aetherklang.page.boss_rewards.subt: PLAYABLE · Cores for the next voice
kodex.aetherklang.page.boss_rewards.body: Tremolo and Glissanda each drop 2 boss materials, 2 keys, and 8 dust; Kakophon drops 2 Swarm Eyes, 3 keys, and 10 dust; General Pause drops 3 Silence Shards, 4 keys, and 12 dust.
A player kill grants 2 more keys through Leitmotiv, or 3 for General Pause. Loot and progress rewards feed Forge and tree.
kodex.aetherklang.page.leitmotiv_tree.bo: Press L to open the Leitmotiv tree. Combat, Harmony, and World each contain eight linear nodes with increasing key costs.
Unlocks are permanent, server-authoritative, and additive. Establish one core voice first, then round it out with another branch.
kodex.aetherklang.page.leitmotiv_kampf.b: Combat increases resonance damage, expands the PERFECT window twice, and adds points to positive RP gains.
The branch ends with another ten percent resonance damage. It rewards safe hits more than frantic strings.
kodex.aetherklang.page.leitmotiv_harmoni: Harmony improves healing and dissonance decay, widens the GOOD window, and raises RP capacity by ten through Deep Reserve.
Life Song completes the voice with more healing. The branch sustains long expeditions and ensemble roles.
kodex.aetherklang.page.leitmotiv_welt.bo: World lowers dash cost, expands RP capacity and the GOOD window, and increases positive RP gains.
Master Journey removes another two RP from Resonance Dash. Final cost can never fall below one RP.
kodex.aetherklang.page.notenschluessel.s: PLAYABLE · Currency of a personal melody
kodex.aetherklang.page.notenschluessel.b: Score contracts, advancements, and boss victories award keys. Creative players do not consume keys when unlocking.
Each node costs one to three keys and requires its predecessor. The Leitmotiv screen shows stock, prerequisite, and effect.
kodex.aetherklang.page.leitmotiv_synergi: Window bonuses stack with equipment and Beatling; RP capacity stacks with the Klangweaver Chestplate. Damage and healing flow through the central Resonance API.
Do not chase only capstones. A cheaper dash, wider window, and larger reserve together can outperform one final node.
kodex.aetherklang.page.partitur_daily.su: PLAYABLE · Three contracts per world day
kodex.aetherklang.page.partitur_daily.bo: The Score deterministically selects three contracts from at least eight definitions. A rotation lasts 24,000 world ticks.
Open it at a Music Stand or with /aetherklang partitur. Progress and claimed rewards are stored per Resonant.
kodex.aetherklang.page.partitur_objectiv: PLAYABLE · Hunt, chord, travel, rift, RP
Contracts count Motif kills, played chords, visited regions, sealed rifts, or resonance actually credited.
Only matching targets count: Motif Runner, Healing Triad, Kammerton, or Resonance Garden. General contracts accept any variant.
kodex.aetherklang.page.partitur_rotation: At day change, the Score replaces its three voices. The screen shows remaining time, progress, and claimed rewards.
Claim completed contracts before rotation. A new selection begins with its own progress state.
Contracts award combinations of RP, Leitmotiv Keys, Sound Dust, Resonance Ingots, Silence Shards, Cascade Cores, or Amethyst Shards.
Rewards must be claimed in the Score screen. Full inventories safely drop remaining items beside you.
kodex.aetherklang.page.notenpult.title: The Music Stand
kodex.aetherklang.page.notenpult.subtitl: PLAYABLE · Interface to the daily Score
kodex.aetherklang.page.notenpult.body.1: Use aetherklang:notenpult to open the synchronized contract selection. The server remains authoritative for counters and rewards.
kodex.aetherklang.page.notenpult.body.2: The /aetherklang partitur open command opens the same view and supports tests without a placed stand.
kodex.aetherklang.page.partitur_klangwer: Contract definitions live in the reloadable Klangwerk catalog. An invalid pack never replaces the last valid snapshot.
Administrators inspect it with /aetherklang klangwerk dump and reload it with /aetherklang klangwerk reload.
kodex.aetherklang.page.klangamboss.title: The Sound Anvil
Hold Timpani, Soprano Flute, Double Bass, or Triangle in your main hand and use the Sound Anvil. Ingredients are consumed atomically.
A relic in the offhand fills the instrument's single socket instead. An occupied socket cannot be overwritten.
kodex.aetherklang.page.klangstufen.title: Three Sound Tiers
Every upgrade advances exactly one tier. Master extends instrument effects and shortens cooldown; Virtuoso also increases effect strength.
Glint and tooltip show tier and socket. Virtuoso instruments are complete and have no further recipe.
kodex.aetherklang.page.schmiede_material: PLAYABLE · Ingot, dust, and boss voice
Master recipes cost two Resonance Ingots, eight Sound Dust, and a matching drop. Virtuoso costs four ingots, sixteen dust, and rarer loot.
The boss ingredient depends on the instrument. The Forge reports missing amounts before consuming anything.
kodex.aetherklang.page.relic_sockets.bod: Every Sinfonie instrument accepts one of twelve relics: Metronome, Echo, Fermata, Crescendo, Ostinato, Cadence, Legato, Staccato, Fortissimo, Pianissimo, Harmony, or Dissonance.
Loose relics work for 15 seconds with a 30-second cooldown. Socketing consumes one outside Creative and permanently binds its effect to the instrument.
kodex.aetherklang.page.relic_effects.bod: Metronome grants Haste, Echo Absorption, Fermata Slow Falling, Crescendo Strength, Ostinato Regeneration, and Cadence Luck.
Legato grants Health Boost, Staccato Jump Boost, Fortissimo Fire Resistance, Pianissimo Invisibility, Harmony Resistance; Dissonance grants Night Vision and removes Darkness.
kodex.aetherklang.page.sinfonie_instrume: Timpani costs 8 RP and knocks enemies away; Flute costs 5 RP, heals, and clears Poison; Bass costs 7 RP, protects and hinders; Triangle costs 4 RP, speeds and reveals.
Each use counts as an on-beat action, may grant perfect RP, and costs 1 durability. Tiers extend effects from 5 to 9 s and lower cooldown from 9 to 5.5 s.
kodex.aetherklang.page.weltakkord.title: The World Chord
kodex.aetherklang.page.weltakkord.subtit: PLAYABLE · Five moods, one world voice
kodex.aetherklang.page.weltakkord.body.1: An ensemble plays Silence → Joy → Wonder → Sorrow → Wrath within a twelve-second progress window.
kodex.aetherklang.page.weltakkord.body.2: It heals allies, grants Absorption, and damages and launches enemies with scaling power. A 25-second cooldown follows.
kodex.aetherklang.page.stimmlagen.title: Four Voice Parts
kodex.aetherklang.page.stimmlagen.body.1: Instruments assign a preferred part. Uninstrumented members automatically fill the least represented part.
kodex.aetherklang.page.stimmlagen.body.2: More members and distinct parts strengthen the World Chord. A tamed Beatling supplies a second voice for solo players.
kodex.aetherklang.page.kaskade_call.body: After eight quiet minutes, a world may test for a Cascade every 30 seconds. Success opens a rift 18 to 32 blocks from a Resonant.
Administrators start and inspect the flow with /aetherklang kaskade start and /aetherklang kaskade status.
kodex.aetherklang.page.kaskade_waves.bod: Wave one sends three Runners and one Pulser. Wave two mixes two Runners, two Wings, and one Pulser.
The final wave brings two Wings and one empowered Pulser. The next wave begins only after every tracked creature falls.
kodex.aetherklang.page.dissonanzherold.s: PLAYABLE · Elite of the third wave
kodex.aetherklang.page.dissonanzherold.b: The final Pulser is named Dissonance Herald, glows, and has 90 health, ten attack damage, and eight armor.
Control the Wings first, then the Herald. The rift remains active while any Cascade creature survives.
kodex.aetherklang.page.kaskadenkern.body: Participants within 48 blocks are recorded. After wave three, each gets one Cascade Core, or two when at least three players joined.
The rift closes and End Rods with ensemble sparks mark the cadence. With no participants, one core drops at the anchor.
kodex.aetherklang.page.motivwesen.title: Motif Creatures
kodex.aetherklang.page.motivwesen.body.1: Runner, Wing, and Pulser are three archetypes with 20 variants. On spawn, each selects data-driven name, color, scale, speed, and bonus loot.
kodex.aetherklang.page.motivwesen.body.2: On-beat hits deal 1.75 times damage. One clean accent is the universal answer to their changing values.
kodex.aetherklang.page.motiv_laeufer.bod: Presto, Ostinato, and Syncopation are joined by Largo Guardian, Pizzicato Jumper, Marcato Breaker, and Fugato Pursuer.
Values range from 20–48 health, 4–9 attack, and 0.18–0.34 speed. Let fast variants pass; keep heavy ones at range.
kodex.aetherklang.page.motiv_schwinge.bo: Legato, Staccato, and Nocturne are joined by Glissando Glider, Tremolo Hummer, Fermata Moth, and Arpeggio Wing.
Values range from 14–38 health and 0.20–0.38 speed. During Cascades, two Wings apply side pressure while Pulsers hold ground.
kodex.aetherklang.page.motiv_pulser.body: Bass and Triplet are joined by Fortissimo, Diminuendo, Polyrhythm, and Fermata. Extremes range from 24–60 health and 0.13–0.31 speed.
Pulsers provide cores, ingots, dust, keys, or shards as bonuses. Save heavy abilities for their clear on-beat window.
kodex.aetherklang.page.motiv_variants.bo: All 20 variants synchronize name, primary and secondary color, and scale to the renderer. The selected variant persists across saves.
Read silhouette and name, then pace. One archetype can demand a different priority through values and loot.
kodex.aetherklang.page.motiv_loot.title: Motif Loot
kodex.aetherklang.page.motiv_loot.body.1: Every Runner drops a base 2 Dust + 1 Ingot, every Wing 2 Dust + 1 String Heart, and every Pulser 3 Dust + 1 Tremolo Core.
kodex.aetherklang.page.motiv_loot.body.2: Variant loot adds Dust, Ingots, Keys, String Hearts, Swarm Eyes, Silence Shards, Cascade Cores, or Tremolo Cores.
kodex.aetherklang.page.motiv_tactics.bod: In mixed groups, remove fast Wings, then Runners, then heavy Pulsers. Control fields break the pressure of wave two.
Use the 1.75× on-beat damage, reserve RP for movement, and never fight while standing in the Cascade rift.
kodex.aetherklang.page.generalpause_oede: Beyond the Cacophony Reef lies the fourth great region: a gold-crowned General Pause shelf with the Empty Podium boss landmark.
The long southern journey demands supplies and return markers. General Pause answers haste with Silence Zones, Fermatas, and heavy shockwaves.
advancements.aetherklang.sinfonie.root.d: Compose every voice of Aetherklang into one path.
advancements.aetherklang.sinfonie.welt_t: Earn a Beatling companion in the Kammerton.
advancements.aetherklang.sinfonie.kampf_: Defeat Choral, conductor of broken voices.
advancements.aetherklang.sinfonie.handwe: Craft a Tuning Fork and begin listening.
Upgrade an instrument to masterwork tier.
Upgrade an instrument to virtuoso tier.
Socket a relic into an instrument.
advancements.aetherklang.sinfonie.meiste: Complete and claim a Partitur contract.
Complete all three contracts in one rotation.
Reach the final node of a Leitmotiv branch.
Form an ensemble with another Resonant.
